heading: ALLOCATION OF REVENUE: CERTAIN MUNICIPALITIES
operative_text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this chapter, a municipality to which this section applies may use all or any portion of the revenue derived from the municipal hotel occupancy tax for: (1) the construction, enlarging, equipping, improvement, maintenance, repairing, and operation of a recreational facility to substantially enhance hotel activity and encourage tourism; and (2) the construction, enlarging, equipping, improvement, maintenance, repairing, and operation of an arena used for rodeos, livestock shows, and agricultural expositions to substantially enhance hotel activity and encourage tourism.
_note: Section defines eligible municipalities by population and geographic criteria in Subsection (a); operative authorization is in Subsection (b). Subsections (c)-(e) impose caps, analyst requirements, and annual reporting. No defined terms section present.
